form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign third of 7 at Fontainebleau November 3 over 2000m, soft track; 1.0 len behind Always Welcome with 56kg at $1.50. Previously first up; third of 8 at Chantilly All Weather October 11 over 1900m, 1.2 len behind Hypercore with 56kg at $6.20. Expect he will go well.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Cologne October 12 over 2200m, soft track; 9 len behind Niclas carrying 56kg at $3. Previously first up; third of 8 at Baden Baden September 7 over 1800m, 2.25 len behind Asterix carrying 57kg at $5. Might need the run.

form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since he finished last in a small field at Baden Baden in the G3 May 31 over 2000m, 3.5 len behind Juwelier carrying 58kg at $4.20. At his first start won by 1.0 len Cologne March 30 2025 over 1850m defeating Eagle Emblem with 57kg at $3.80. Look for a bold run.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of nine months. Finished off last preparation fourth of 9 at Jagersro July 13 over 1730m, 4.5 len behind Twirling Ghost with 59kg at $11.78. When resuming last campaign third in a small field at Jagersro June 18 over 2200m, 1.2 len behind Moon String carrying 64kg at $4.46. Could prove too smart for these.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Longchamp in the G3 Pr Hocquart May 22 over 2200m. Won previous preparation first up won by 10 len at Dortmund September 15 2024 over 1600m defeating Bright Smiles with 58kg at $1.80. Likely to feature.

formComments.title: TAB

Won previous preparation first up won by 10 len at Dortmund September 15 2024 over 1600m defeating Bright Smiles with 58kg at $1.80. Likely to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign 14th of 17 at Hamburg in the G1 Deutsches Derby July 6 over 2400m, 11 len behind Hochkonig carrying 58kg at $43.60. On debut third of 13 at Strasbourg March 22 2025 over 2000m, soft track; 8 len behind Akido with 56kg at $2.70. Solid top-three proposition.
